title: E-commerce Product Recommendation Analysis Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Recommendation Analysis Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="400" height="300">
  <g transform="translate(150,100)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="200" height="200" rx="10" fill="#C06C88" fill-opacity="0.2"/>
    <rect x="10" y="10" width="180" height="180" rx="10" fill="#B7D7CD" fill-opacity="0.2"/>
    <rect x="20" y="20" width="160" height="160" rx="10" fill="#411C56" fill-opacity="0.2"/>
    <text x="25" y="25" font-size="14" fill="#ffffff">Product Grid</text>
    <rect x="220" y="0" width="180" height="200" rx="10" fill="#C06C88" fill-opacity="0.2"/>
    <text x="235" y="25" font-size="14" fill="#ffffff">Recommendation Section</text>
    <rect x="10" y="210" width="200" height="80" rx="10" fill="#B7D7CD" fill-opacity="0.2"/>
    <text x="20" y="220" font-size="14" fill="#ffffff">Product Analysis Table</text>
  </g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use a product grid component with filtering and sorting options
Must include an AI-generated slider for product recommendation
Must have a detailed product analysis table with rich data and interactive controls

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Recommendation Analysis Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive filtering, sorting, and recommendation sliders, as well as interactive controls in the product analysis table.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
